title: Ballata per un pistolero
writer: Alfio Caltabiano, Ernst Ritter von Theumer
actors: Dragomir Bojanic-Gidra, Angelo Infanti, Mario Novelli
plot: Instead of fighting over newly-gained money from a coach-robbery, two gangster-brothers (El Bedoja and Chiuchi) decide to rob a bank together. But Martinez, a gangster-coward, is successfully questioned by Nigros (a clad-in-black ...
